# CLI Reference

<!-- Generated by seogeo docs generate. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Commands

## `check`

Run static checks against a site directory

```text
Run static checks against a site directory

Usage: check [OPTIONS] [path]

Arguments:
  [path]
          [default: .]

Options:
      --config <config>
          

      --baseline <baseline>
          

      --regressions-only
          

      --format <format>
          [default: text]
          [possible values: text, json, sarif]

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `crawl`

Run runtime checks against a served website

```text
Run runtime checks against a served website

Usage: crawl [OPTIONS] <url>

Arguments:
  <url>
          

Options:
      --seed <seed>
          

      --include-pattern <include-pattern>
          

      --exclude-pattern <exclude-pattern>
          

      --no-sitemap-seed
          

      --max-pages <max-pages>
          [default: 200]

      --config <config>
          

      --baseline <baseline>
          

      --regressions-only
          

      --engine <engine>
          [possible values: auto, http, playwright]

      --format <format>
          [default: text]
          [possible values: text, json, sarif]

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `config`

Inspect resolved configuration

```text
Inspect resolved configuration

Usage: config [COMMAND]

Commands:
  print  Render the resolved config after extends and defaults
  help   Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

Options:
  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `quality`

Run self-quality checks against a seogeo repository

```text
Run self-quality checks against a seogeo repository

Usage: quality [OPTIONS] [path]

Arguments:
  [path]
          [default: .]

Options:
      --format <format>
          [default: text]
          [possible values: text, json, sarif]

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `generate`

Generate deterministic SEO/GEO artifacts

```text
Generate deterministic SEO/GEO artifacts

Usage: generate [OPTIONS] <kind> [path]

Arguments:
  <kind>
          [possible values: llms, llms-full, markdown-mirror, robots, links]

  [path]
          [default: .]

Options:
      --config <config>
          

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `docs`

Generate or verify code-derived repository docs

```text
Generate or verify code-derived repository docs

Usage: docs <action> [path]

Arguments:
  <action>
          [possible values: generate, check]

  [path]
          [default: .]

Options:
  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `baseline`

Save a baseline audit for later regression comparison

```text
Save a baseline audit for later regression comparison

Usage: baseline [OPTIONS] [path]

Arguments:
  [path]
          [default: .]

Options:
      --config <config>
          

      --output <output>
          

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `verify`

Run post-deploy verification and compare to a baseline

```text
Run post-deploy verification and compare to a baseline

Usage: verify [OPTIONS] <url>

Arguments:
  <url>
          

Options:
      --seed <seed>
          

      --include-pattern <include-pattern>
          

      --exclude-pattern <exclude-pattern>
          

      --no-sitemap-seed
          

      --config <config>
          

      --baseline <baseline>
          

      --max-pages <max-pages>
          [default: 200]

      --engine <engine>
          [possible values: auto, http, playwright]

      --format <format>
          [default: text]
          [possible values: text, json]

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `diff`

Compare two audit artifacts and report regressions

```text
Compare two audit artifacts and report regressions

Usage: diff [OPTIONS] <baseline> <current>

Arguments:
  <baseline>
          

  <current>
          

Options:
      --format <format>
          [default: text]
          [possible values: text, json]

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `trend`

Show recent audit trend history for a command

```text
Show recent audit trend history for a command

Usage: trend [OPTIONS] <command_name> [path]

Arguments:
  <command_name>
          [possible values: check, crawl, quality]

  [path]
          [default: .]

Options:
      --format <format>
          [default: text]
          [possible values: text, json]

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `fix`

Apply safe deterministic fixes

```text
Apply safe deterministic fixes

Usage: fix [OPTIONS] [path]

Arguments:
  [path]
          [default: .]

Options:
      --config <config>
          

  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `rules`

List built-in rule groups

```text
List built-in rule groups

Usage: rules

Options:
  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `adapters`

List registered site adapters

```text
List registered site adapters

Usage: adapters

Options:
  -h, --help
          Print help
```

## `plugin-check`

Validate one plugin module manifest and compatibility

```text
Validate one plugin module manifest and compatibility

Usage: plugin-check <module_name>

Arguments:
  <module_name>
          

Options:
  -h, --help
          Print help
```
